title: Mirror subitem name on another board
excerpt:

posts.author: ZitaHiss (Zita Hiss)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m working on a request board that is linked to several different boards and have to use subitems for a certain request.

I already figured out how to create an item on a different board when the subitem is created and how to mirror all the columns from the subitem, but one thing I just can’t find.
How do you mirror the the subitems name on the other board. Because it’s all useless if I can not see the name.

Also as extra information the subitem is created when a certain status is requested. So in automation I have selected to create a new item on the other board when a subitem is created but because of the status trigger it will only create new items on the other board with the name “New item”. I’m not looking forward to change that every time manually. So that’s why I thought a mirror solution would be nice. Or can I just get rid of the subitem name column and just replace it for a text column that does mirror.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you include some screenshots to make it more clear?
